About me
The person behind
the automations

Hi! I'm Kamran — a GHL Expert and Automation Specialist based in Lahore, Pakistan. For the past 2 years, I've been obsessed with one thing: helping businesses stop doing things manually that machines can do better.

Whether you're an agency drowning in repetitive tasks, a startup trying to scale without hiring an army, or an entrepreneur juggling too many tools — I build the systems that connect everything and run automatically.

"Automate the routine. Focus on the human."

I hold a Bachelor's in Computer Science from COMSATS University (2024), which gives me the technical depth to build automations that are actually reliable — not just duct-taped together.

Portfolio
Real work,
real results
GoHighLevel · CRM
Agency CRM Full Setup

End-to-end GHL CRM implementation with automated lead nurturing, pipeline management, and funnel optimization.

Vapi.ai · AI Agents
AI Voice Agent System

Intelligent voice agent for automated lead qualification and 24/7 appointment booking — achieving 100% call success.

Make.com · Integration
Multi-App Integration Hub

Connecting Lemlist and HubSpot CRM — syncing email activities into tasks automatically, eliminating all manual data entry.

Lemlist · Email Outreach
Cold Email Sequence Setup

Built a multi-step cold outreach sequence — 3-email drip with smart delays, personalized with dynamic variables like {firstName} and tailored subject lines per step.

Lemlist · Analytics
Campaign: 35.8% Open Rate

Managed a 1,926-lead campaign with 94.4% deliverability and 35.8% open rate — achieved through sender warm-up, A2P compliance, and precision targeting.

GoHighLevel · Compliance
A2P 10DLC & SHAKEN/STIR Setup

Full A2P registration for Toll-Free and Local numbers — Brand & Campaign Approved. SHAKEN/STIR caller-ID authentication configured to prevent spam labeling and maximize answer rates.

GoHighLevel · Workflows
Omni-Channel AI Workflow

Complex GHL workflow handling inbound leads across SMS, Chat Widget, Instagram DM, Facebook Messenger & Forms — with GPT-powered AI responses, conditional branching, and automated follow-up sequences per channel.

Make.com · Vapi.ai · GHL
AI Voice Post-Call Automation

After every Vapi.ai call, Make.com routes by call status — creates a ClickUp task for ended calls, updates the GHL contact for no-answers, and sends an HTTP fallback. Fully automated post-call CRM sync.

Make.com · ClickUp · OpenAI
ClickUp → GHL AI Email on Approval

When a ClickUp task is marked "Approved," Make.com fetches task details, uses OpenAI to generate a personalized email, finds the GHL contact, and sends — zero manual effort.

ActiveCampaign · Make.com
Fathom Meeting → ClickUp Task Sync

When a new Fathom meeting recording is added, Make.com finds the matching ClickUp task and updates it with notes — or creates a new task if none exists. Meeting records stay perfectly in sync automatically.
